subcodes.first_line: To Thee be praise, O my God, for having illumined my heart with the light of Thy knowledge, for having made me to know Thy path, and for having shown me the Dayspring of Thy bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما نورت قلبی بنور عرفانک و عرفتنی سبیلک و اریتنی مشرق عطائک
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @thankfulness; gratitude, @humility; meekness; lowliness
